privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task uses completely synthetic instructions injected into a text file (/home/ga/Desktop/compliance_corrective_action.txt) during setup_task.sh. The required department rename ('Infrastructure & Cloud Operations'), new department creation ('Environmental Health & Safety' / 'EHS'), department deactivation ('Maintenance & Support'), new Standard Occupational Classification (SOC) job codes (17-2199, 15-1244, 13-1161), and employee reassignments (EMP009, EMP010, EMP017, EMP014) exactly match the explicit instructions in the generated corrective action notice and the verifier scripts.
